Located directly at the shore of the lake, TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee offers rooms with elegant, wooden furniture and a flat-screen cable TV. The hotel features a restaurant and a wellness area with panoramic views of the lake and the Totes Gebirge Mountain Range.

All rooms are equipped with a minibar and have a bathroom with amenities and a hairdryer. Some rooms face the lake or come with a seating area or a sofa bed. Free wired internet is available in all rooms.

The on-site SEEplatzГўв‚¬в„ўl restaurant serves Austrian and international specialities made with local products. TAUROA Seehotel GrundlseeГўв‚¬в„ўs daily served breakfast can also be consumed in the rooms or on the lake-facing terrace during summer.

Las habitaciones disponen de minibar y baГѓВ±o con artГѓВ­culos de aseo y secador de pelo. Algunas gozan de vistas al lago o tienen zona de estar o 1 sofГѓВЎ cama. Hay conexiГѓВіn a internet por cable gratuita en todas las habitaciones.

El restaurante SEEplatz'l sirve especialidades austriacas e internacionales elaboradas con productos locales. El TAUROA Seehotel Grundlsee sirve un desayuno todos los dГѓВ­as, que puede tomarse en la habitaciГѓВіn o en la terraza con vistas al lago en verano.

Tutte le sistemazioni vantano un minibar, un bagno con set di cortesia e asciugacapelli, la connessione gratuita a internet via cavo e, in alcuni casi, la vista sul lago, un'area salotto o un divano-letto.
